response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant recent work in TypeScript/Node.js at re:cinq including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a strong match for the AI agent development requirement. Solid breadth across the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Git) plus polyglot experience (Java, C++, DLang, Python-adjacent). Gaps exist around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, and no explicit PostgreSQL or major cloud platform depth shown, but overall fit is strong.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (13+ years) with TypeScript/Node.js and React across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators at current role
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, custom test runner)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) depth beyond AWS CDK reference
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less recent depth in mainstream enterprise stacks
